mapei-mapeset.name: MAPESET
mapei-mapeset.description: Cementitious adhesive with no vertical slip for internal and external bonding of ceramic tiles and mosaics, single-fired and double-fired tiles for floors and walls.
application_areas: Ceramic tiles, mosaics, single- & double-fired tiles

mapei-keraset.name: KERASET
mapei-keraset.description: Dry-set mortar for interior/exterior residential and light commercial floor and wall applications. C1 classification when mixed with water.
mapei-keraset.classification_detail: Normal cementitious adhesive (C1 with water; C2ES1P1 with Keraply additive)

strength.bond: Exceeds ANSI A118.1 (with water); ANSI A118.4/A118.11 (with Keraply)

application_areas: Interior/exterior floor and wall residential & light commercial

mapei-kerabond-t.name: KERABOND T
mapei-kerabond-t.description: Cementitious adhesive with no vertical slip for ceramic tiles (thickness of adhesive up to 5 mm).

coverage.notes: Mosaics ~2-3, medium tiles ~4-5, large tiles >6, spot-bonding insulation 0.5-1.5

mapei-kerabond-plus.name: KERABOND PLUS
mapei-kerabond-plus.description: Improved cementitious adhesive with extended open time for bonding all types of ceramic tile and mosaic on internal and external floors, walls and ceilings.
mapei-kerabond-plus.classification_detail: Cementitious (C), improved (2), extended open time (E). When mixed with Isolastic: C2ES2

mapei-adesilex-p7.name: ADESILEX P7
mapei-adesilex-p7.description: High-performance cementitious adhesive with no vertical slip for ceramic and porcelain tiles. Interior and exterior bonding of ceramic tiles, porcelain and mosaics.

mapei-adesilex-p9.name: ADESILEX P9
mapei-adesilex-p9.description: High-performance cementitious adhesive with no vertical slip and extended open time for ceramic, vitrified and mosaic tiles, stone.
mapei-adesilex-p9.classification_detail: Cementitious (C), improved (2), slip resistant (T), extended open time (E)

mapei-adesilex-p10.name: ADESILEX P10
mapei-adesilex-p10.description: High-performance cementitious adhesive for glass/ceramic/vitrified/marble mosaic and stone tiles.
mapei-adesilex-p10.classification_detail: Improved (2) slip-resistant (T) cementitious (C) extended open time (E)

mapei-keraflex.name: KERAFLEX
mapei-keraflex.description: Cementitious adhesive with good deformability, excellent bond, high performance, extended open time and no vertical slip. Suitable for ceramic and natural stone, perfect for mosaic.
mapei-keraflex.classification_detail: Improved (2) slip-resistant (T) cementitious (C) extended open time (E)

mapei-keraflex-maxi-s1-zero.name: KERAFLEX MAXI S1 ZERO
mapei-keraflex-maxi-s1-zero.description: High-performance, deformable, grey and ultra-white cementitious adhesive with no vertical slip, extended open time, and Low Dust technology. Carbon-neutral product (CO2 offset via certified carbon credits). Designed for ceramic and natural stone tiles, excellent for large-format tiles.
mapei-keraflex-maxi-s1-zero.classification_detail: Cementitious (C), improved (2), slip-resistant (T), extended open time (E), deformable (S1)

mapei-ultralite-s2-flex.name: ULTRALITE S2 FLEX
mapei-ultralite-s2-flex.description: One-component, high-performance, highly deformable, lightweight cementitious adhesive with extended open time, Low Dust technology and extremely high yield. Specifically for large-format tiles including external facades and insulation systems.
mapei-ultralite-s2-flex.classification_detail: Cementitious (C), improved (2), anti-slip (T), extended open time (E), highly deformable (S2)

coverage.notes: Lightweight — 13.5 kg bag = same volume as 20 kg standard bag

mapei-granirapid.name: GRANIRAPID
mapei-granirapid.description: Two-component, rapid-setting cementitious adhesive for bonding ceramic tiles and stone with extraordinary bonding and fast-setting characteristics. Suitable for rapid re-tiling where flooring must be ready within short times.

mapei-keralastic-t.name: KERALASTIC T
mapei-keralastic-t.description: Two-component high-performance polyurethane adhesive (thixotropic version) for ceramic tiles and stone. Particularly suitable for vertical applications. Essential for natural stone/agglomerates subject to movement and moisture.
mapei-keralastic-t.classification_detail: Improved (2) reaction resin (R) polyurethane adhesive with no vertical slip (T)
application_areas: Metal, wood, fibre-cement, rubber, PVC, linoleum

mapei-kerapoxy-adhesive.name: KERAPOXY ADHESIVE
mapei-kerapoxy-adhesive.description: Two-component, epoxy resin-based, high-strength adhesive with silica sand. Thixotropic mix for internal/external bonding of ceramic, porcelain and stone to floors and walls at thicknesses up to 1 cm in a single coat.
mapei-kerapoxy-adhesive.classification_detail: Improved (2) reaction resin (R) with no vertical slip (T)
mapei-kerapoxy-adhesive.thickness_range: Up to 10 mm in one coat

mapei-mapecryll-eco.name: MAPECRYLL ECO
mapei-mapecryll-eco.description: Ready-to-use, high-performance, paste tile adhesive for indoor wall tiling. Solvent-free, very low VOC emissions (EMICODE EC1 Plus).
mapei-mapecryll-eco.classification_detail: Improved (2) dispersion adhesive (D) with no vertical slip (T) and extended open time (E)

mapei-adesilex-g19.name: ADESILEX G19
mapei-adesilex-g19.description: Two-component epoxy-polyurethane adhesive for bonding rubber, PVC, vinyl, textile, and linoleum floor coverings. Specifically developed for rubber athletic tracks and areas under heavy mechanical stress.

coverage.notes: ~20 m²/10 kg; 10 m²/5 kg; 4 m²/2 kg

mapei-adesilex-g19.notes: Also available as ADESILEX G19 FR (fire-resistant EN 45545-2 HL1-HL2) and ADESILEX G19 FAST (rapid setting)

mapei-keracolor-ff.name: KERACOLOR FF
mapei-keracolor-ff.description: High-performance, polymer-modified cementitious mortar with water-repellent DropEffect® technology for grouting joints up to 6 mm. Suitable for interior/exterior floors and walls.
mapei-keracolor-ff.classification_detail: Improved (2) cementitious (CG) grout with reduced water absorption (W) and high abrasion resistance (A). EN 13888 / ISO 13007-3

coverage.notes: Depends on joint width, tile size and thickness

mapei-ultracolor-plus.name: ULTRACOLOR PLUS
mapei-ultracolor-plus.description: High-performance, quick-setting, polymer-modified, Portland-cement-free cementitious grout with water-repellent DropEffect® and anti-mould BioBlock® technology. For joints 2-20 mm. Anti-efflorescence.
mapei-ultracolor-plus.classification_detail: Improved (2) cementitious (CG) grout, reduced water absorption (W), high abrasion resistance (A). EN 13888 / ISO 13007-3 CG2WAF
application_areas: All types of ceramic, stone, glass/marble mosaic

mapei-kerapoxy.name: KERAPOXY
mapei-kerapoxy.description: Two-component acid-resistant high-performance epoxy grout for grouting ceramic tiles and stone material. For joints of at least 3 mm. Also usable as an adhesive.
mapei-kerapoxy.classification_detail: Reactive resin (R) grout (G), high chemical resistance. EN 13888

mapei-mapegrout-me-05.name: MAPEGROUT ME05
mapei-mapegrout-me-05.description: Pre-blended powder of selected cement, aggregates, and special additives designed to be shrinkage compensated. Forms a fluid micro-concrete for pouring/pumping into formwork without segregation. For pile cap treatment, column jacketing, and structural repair.
mapei-mapegrout-me-05.mix_ratio: 3.1-3.3 L water per 25 kg (or with Mapecure SRA)

mapei-mapegrout-me-06.name: MAPEGROUT ME06
mapei-mapegrout-me-06.description: High-strength, shrinkage-compensated, super-flow micro-concrete. Used for structural repair where thickness and deterioration require high-flow concrete, and for grouting gaps 30-250 mm thick.
mapei-mapegrout-me-06.mix_ratio: 100 parts powder : 12.4-13.6 parts water (3.1-3.4 L per bag)

mapei-mapegrout-t60-me.name: MAPEGROUT T60 ME
mapei-mapegrout-t60-me.description: Thixotropic, sulphate and chloride resistant, fibre-reinforced structural repair mortar. For repairs to new and old concrete structures subject to aggressive atmospheric conditions including chloride and sulphate attack.
mapei-mapegrout-t60-me.classification: EN 1504-3 R4 class structural repair mortar
mapei-mapegrout-t60-me.thickness_range: Up to 50 mm/layer (vertical), 20 mm/layer (ceiling, no formwork)
mapei-mapegrout-t60-me.mix_ratio: 100 parts powder : 15 parts water + 0.25% Mapecure SRA

mapei-mapegrout-t80-me.name: MAPEGROUT T80 ME
mapei-mapegrout-t80-me.description: Single-component sulphate and chloride resistant, fibre-reinforced thixotropic mortar for repair of concrete. Higher strength version of T60. Suitable for new/old concrete subject to chloride and sulphate attack.
mapei-mapegrout-t80-me.classification: EN 1504-3 R4 class structural repair mortar
mapei-mapegrout-t80-me.mix_ratio: 100 parts powder : 15-17 parts water + 0.25% Mapecure SRA

mapei-mapefill-gp-me.name: MAPEFILL GP ME
mapei-mapefill-gp-me.description: Pre-blended powdered grout based on high-strength cement, graded aggregates (1.2 mm diameter) and special additives with an expansive agent. Total absence of shrinkage (ASTM C940) in the plastic phase. Very highly fluid grout for filling intricate spaces.
mapei-mapefill-gp-me.classification: EN 1504-9 / EN 1504-6 compliant (general purpose non-shrink grout)

strength.compressive: High early flexural and compressive strength

application_areas: Grouting base plates and bridge bearings
Anchoring mechanical equipment and steel bars

mapei-mapefill-sp-me.name: MAPEFILL SP ME
mapei-mapefill-sp-me.description: Pre-blended powdered grout with high-strength cement, graded aggregates and expansive agent. Very high early strength. Total absence of shrinkage in plastic phase (ASTM C940) and expansion in hardened phase (ASTM C878). For precision anchoring.
mapei-mapefill-sp-me.classification: Non-shrink precision grout (ASTM C940, ASTM C878)
mapei-mapefill-sp-me.thickness_max: 60 mm (single pour for connecting precast elements)

mapei-planitop-110-me.name: PLANITOP 110 ME
mapei-planitop-110-me.description: Single-component, normal setting cementitious mortar for smoothing concrete surfaces. Protection, smoothing and levelling of concrete surface imperfections up to 2 mm in a single application. Fine-aggregate mortar with synthetic polymers.
mapei-planitop-110-me.mix_ratio: 100 parts powder : 31-32 parts water (6.2-6.4 L per bag)

mapei-adesilex-pg2-tg.name: ADESILEX PG2 TG
mapei-adesilex-pg2-tg.description: Two-component epoxy resin-based structural bonding adhesive with fine-grain aggregates. Thixotropic, applicable on vertical surfaces up to 1 cm in single layer. Hardens without shrinkage. Specifically for high temperatures (+25°C to +50°C).
application_areas: Bonding fresh concrete to hardened concrete

mapei-mapefix-ep-100.name: MAPEFIX EP 100
mapei-mapefix-ep-100.description: Two-component pure epoxy resin chemical anchor. Certified for threaded bar and rebar in rough or smooth (core-drilled) holes in all types of building materials. Certified for seismic loads (C1 and C2 classes). Suitable for damp/wet/underwater holes.
mapei-mapefix-ep-100.classification: ETA Option 1 (tension/compression), Option 7, REBAR, seismic C1/C2; CE marked
mapei-mapefix-ep-100.final_set: 10-12 hours dry substrate, 20-24 hours wet substrate (at +20°C)

mapei-planigrout-300-me.name: PLANIGROUT 300 ME
mapei-planigrout-300-me.description: Three-component, multi-purpose fluid epoxy resin grout with selected well-graded aggregates. Free flowing, specifically developed for heavy-duty structural support under static and dynamic loads.

mapei-planigrout-300-me-pct.name: PLANIGROUT 300 ME PCT
mapei-planigrout-300-me-pct.description: Three-component, castable, impermeable epoxy grout for pile cap treatment (PCT). Specifically for treatment of pile heads with Mapeplan range of synthetic membranes and other waterproofing materials.
application_areas: Pile head treatment with waterproofing membranes
Under Mapeplan and other synthetic membrane systems

mapei-eporip.name: EPORIP
mapei-eporip.description: Two-component solvent-free epoxy adhesive for monolithic sealing of cracks in screeds and for bonding of fresh concrete to hardened concrete (cold construction joints).

mapei-mapelastic-smart.name: MAPELASTIC SMART
mapei-mapelastic-smart.description: Two-component, high-flexibility cementitious mortar with crack-bridging >2 mm. For waterproofing balconies, terraces, bathrooms, swimming pools, water tanks, potable water structures. Applied by trowel/roller/spray.
pack_size: 30 kg kit (A=20 kg bag + B=10 kg drum)
application_areas: Swimming pools, channels, dams, water tanks
mapei-mapelastic-smart.reinforcement: Mapetex Sel N or Mapenet 150 mesh

mapei-mapelastic-easy.name: MAPELASTIC EASY
mapei-mapelastic-easy.description: Two-component acrylic-modified cementitious, flexible waterproof coating easy to apply. For waterproofing balconies, terraces, and bathrooms.

mapei-mapelastic-aquadefense.name: MAPELASTIC AQUADEFENSE
mapei-mapelastic-aquadefense.description: Ready-to-use, ultra-quick-drying, flexible one-component liquid rubber membrane for internal and external waterproofing. Light blue synthetic resin paste in water dispersion. Dries in 30-50 minutes; flood-testable in 12 hours.
mapei-mapelastic-aquadefense.classification: ANSI A118.10-LV and A118.12; AS/NZS 4858:2004 Class III; AS 4654.1-2012
mapei-mapelastic-aquadefense.recoat_wait: ~1 hour between first and second coat
mapei-mapelastic-aquadefense.tile_wait: 3-4 hours (C2F adhesive: tiles + grout then 12 hr to foot traffic)

mapei-mapetex-sel-n.name: MAPETEX SEL N
mapei-mapetex-sel-n.description: Non-woven polypropylene reinforcement fabric for use with Mapelastic Turbo and Mapelastic Smart flexible cementitious waterproofing membranes. Improves toughness, punch-resistance, elongation and crack-bridging.
application_areas: Reinforcement for Mapelastic Turbo and Mapelastic Smart systems
mapei-mapetex-sel-n.installation: Embed between first and second coat of Mapelastic membrane; overlap 5 cm minimum

mapei-purtop-easy.name: PURTOP EASY
mapei-purtop-easy.description: One-component, elastic polyurethane waterproofing membrane in thick-liquid form for flat roofs, terraces, and balconies. Forms a seamless continuous membrane.

mapei-plastimul-dpc.name: PLASTIMUL DPC
mapei-plastimul-dpc.description: Bitumen waterproofing emulsion for foundations and below-ground applications. Damp Proof Course formulation.

mapei-plastimul-dpm.name: PLASTIMUL DPM
mapei-plastimul-dpm.description: Bitumen/rubber latex flexible waterproofing emulsion. Solvent-free emulsion of selected water-emulsified bitumen, rubber latex, special fillers. Flexible waterproof coating resistant to re-emulsifying after prolonged immersion in slightly acid/alkaline water.

mapei-aquaflex-roof-hr.name: AQUAFLEX ROOF HR
mapei-aquaflex-roof-hr.description: Ready-to-use, white, high-reflectance liquid waterproofing membrane for external applications. Synthetic resin in water dispersion. Forms a continuous flexible membrane. SRI 105 (cool roof). UV-resistant.
mapei-aquaflex-roof-hr.classification: EN 1504-2 coating (C) PI-MC-IR / liquid-applied reflective waterproofing
mapei-aquaflex-roof-hr.recoat_wait: 8-12 hours between first and second coat
application_areas: External coating over ceramic, concrete, metal

mapei-planiseal-88.name: PLANISEAL 88
mapei-planiseal-88.description: One-component osmotic mortar composed of cement-based compound, selected graded aggregates and special synthetic resins. Waterproofs even in presence of negative water pressure (up to 1 atm). Certified for potable water contact.
mapei-planiseal-88.classification: Osmotic (crystalline) cementitious waterproofing — negative pressure rated

mapei-lamposilex.name: LAMPOSILEX
mapei-lamposilex.description: Pre-blended powder binder composed of high-strength cements and special admixtures. Ultra-fast setting hydraulic binder for blocking active water leaks ('flash set').
application_areas: Plugging water ingress in underground structures

mapei-topcem-pronto.name: TOPCEM PRONTO
mapei-topcem-pronto.description: Pre-blended ready-to-use mortar with normal setting and controlled shrinkage, fast-drying screed. Just mix with water. For bonded, unbonded, and floating screeds, with 12-hour trafficable and 4-day fully dry cure.
application_areas: Prior to wood parquet, PVC, linoleum, ceramic

mapei-ultraplan-eco.name: ULTRAPLAN ECO
mapei-ultraplan-eco.description: Self-levelling smoothing compound for interiors. For levelling and smoothing differences in thickness from 1 to 10 mm on new or existing substrates before laying all kinds of floorings.
application_areas: Levelling concrete slabs and cementitious screeds
Under wood parquet, ceramic, resilient flooring

mapei-ultraplan-eco-20.name: ULTRAPLAN ECO 20
mapei-ultraplan-eco-20.description: Rapid hydrating, fast-drying self-levelling compound for interiors, thicknesses 1-10 mm. For substrates requiring high resistance to loads and traffic: hospitals, hotels, theatres, schools, shopping centres.
mapei-ultraplan-eco-20.classification: EN 13813 self-levelling compound; EC1 R Plus

mapei-ultraplan-maxi.name: ULTRAPLAN MAXI
mapei-ultraplan-maxi.description: Ultra-fast drying self-levelling compound for thicknesses from 3 to 40 mm per coat without shrinkage, cracking or crazing. Very high compressive and flexural strength; very low VOC.
mapei-ultraplan-maxi.classification: EN 13813 self-levelling compound with high performance
application_areas: Electric heated floor screeds before tiling

mapei-mapefloor-fc200-me.name: MAPEFLOOR FC200 ME
mapei-mapefloor-fc200-me.description: Two-component epoxy formulate with high solid content used to create multi-layered resin coatings with non-slip or roll-coat/structured finish. Durable high-build epoxy floor coating for light industries.

mapei-mapefloor-finish-450-me.name: MAPEFLOOR FINISH 450 ME
mapei-mapefloor-finish-450-me.description: Two-component, aliphatic, elastic coloured polyurethane finish. High resistance to wear, abrasion, and UV rays. Protective topcoat for outdoor car parks, bridges, and walkways after polyurethane waterproofing.

coverage.unit: kg/m² (depends on application method and surface)

mapei-primer-g.name: PRIMER G
mapei-primer-g.description: Synthetic resin-based primer in water dispersion. Used for treating gypsum or anhydrite surfaces prior to installing ceramic tiles and stone, and to provide even absorption before levelling.
mapei-primer-g.dilution: Neat to 1:3 with water depending on substrate absorption
application_areas: Absorbent substrates before tile laying or screeding

mapei-eco-prim-t-plus.name: ECO PRIM T PLUS
mapei-eco-prim-t-plus.description: Universal acrylic levelling primer for treating absorbent and non-absorbent substrates before applying skim coats, levelling compounds, or cementitious adhesives. Solvent-free, low-odour.
mapei-eco-prim-t-plus.classification: Acrylic resin primer in water dispersion (EMICODE EC1 Plus)
mapei-eco-prim-t-plus.dilution: Neat on non-absorbent substrates; 1:2 with water on cementitious/anhydrite

mapei-eco-prim-grip-plus.name: ECO PRIM GRIP PLUS
mapei-eco-prim-grip-plus.description: Multi-purpose, ready-to-use bonding promoter primer for renders, smoothing compounds and cementitious adhesives. Synthetic resin with bond-promoting silica aggregates. Ideal for tile-on-tile installations. Odourless, solvent-free.
mapei-eco-prim-grip-plus.classification: Bond-promoter primer with aggregates (EMICODE EC1 Plus)
application_areas: Non-absorbent surfaces: epoxy, polyurethane, terrazzo, natural stone
Improving bond of renders on brickwork / concrete blocks

mapei-primer-sn.name: PRIMER SN
mapei-primer-sn.description: Two-component epoxy primer with fillers. Specifically formulated for preliminary priming before applying Mapefloor epoxy/polyurethane resin systems and Ultratop self-levelling cementitious mortars. Radon-barrier compliant (DIN ISO/TS 11665-13).
colors: neutral (may be tinted with Mapecolor Paste)

mapei-primer-mf.name: PRIMER MF
mapei-primer-mf.description: Two-component, solvent-free epoxy primer used as bonding promoter for Mapefloor products, for consolidating and waterproofing against residual damp on cementitious substrates, and as anti-dust impregnator on concrete floors.
application_areas: Bonding primer under Mapefloor resin systems

mapei-mapeflex-pu-s25.name: MAPEFLEX PU S25
mapei-mapeflex-pu-s25.description: Low-modulus elastic polyurethane sealant specifically developed for sealing internal and external vertical expansion and construction joints. One-component moisture-curing.
application_areas: Internal and external vertical expansion joints

mapei-mapeflex-pu-45-ft.name: MAPEFLEX PU 45 FT
mapei-mapeflex-pu-45-ft.description: One-component, thixotropic, rapid-hardening paintable polyurethane sealant and adhesive with high modulus of elasticity. Dual-purpose: joint sealant AND flexible bonding adhesive. Solvent-free.
mapei-mapeflex-pu-45-ft.classification: ISO 11600 class F-20 HM (high-modulus); EN 15651-1 F-EXT-INT CC; EN 15651-4 PW-EXT-INT-CC
mapei-mapeflex-pu-45-ft.final_set: 24 h at 3.3 mm / 48 h at 5.2 mm / 7 days at 8.5 mm (at +20°C)
application_areas: Expansion joints on walls and floors
Flexible bonding of dissimilar materials (concrete, steel, aluminium, wood, glass, PVC)

mapei-ultrabond-eco-375.name: ULTRABOND ECO 375
mapei-ultrabond-eco-375.description: Adhesive in water dispersion with strong and quick initial bond, long open time and very low VOC, specifically for vinyl floors.
mapei-ultrabond-eco-375.classification: Water-dispersion vinyl floor adhesive (EMICODE EC1 Plus)
application_areas: Homogeneous & heterogeneous PVC/vinyl sheets and tiles

mapei-ultrabond-eco-170.name: ULTRABOND ECO 170
mapei-ultrabond-eco-170.description: Non-flammable carpet adhesive — acrylic water-dispersion adhesive with long open time for textile floor coverings including carpet tiles and broadloom.
mapei-ultrabond-eco-170.classification: Acrylic water-dispersion carpet adhesive (EMICODE EC1 Plus)
application_areas: Textile floor coverings with latex/PVC/polyurethane foam backing

mapei-ultrabond-eco-fix.name: ULTRABOND ECO FIX
mapei-ultrabond-eco-fix.description: Tackifier / release adhesive for loose-lay carpet tiles and PVC tiles. Water-based dispersion with a permanent tack — tiles can be repositioned or removed.
mapei-ultrabond-eco-fix.classification: Water-based tackifier / pressure-sensitive adhesive (EMICODE EC1 Plus)
application_areas: Raised access floors where tiles must be removable

mapei-ultrabond-eco-v4sp.name: ULTRABOND ECO V4SP
mapei-ultrabond-eco-v4sp.description: Multi-purpose acrylic adhesive in water dispersion with long open time and very low VOC. For laying rubber, PVC, vinyl, polyolephinic, linoleum and carpet flooring.
mapei-ultrabond-eco-v4sp.classification: Multi-purpose acrylic water-dispersion adhesive (EMICODE EC1 Plus)
mapei-ultrabond-eco-v4sp.application_method: N° 1 or 2 notched trowel, TKB A1/A2/B1/B2

mapei-ultrabond-turf-pu-1k.name: ULTRABOND TURF PU 1K
mapei-ultrabond-turf-pu-1k.description: Fast-setting, moisture-curing, one-component, polyurethane urethane adhesive specifically designed for bonding of synthetic turf jointing strips. Meets FIFA standards for sports turf bond strength. Indoor and outdoor use.
certifications: Meets FIFA requirements for sports turf

mapei-ultrabond-turf-2-star-pro-green.name: TURF 2 STAR PRO GREEN
mapei-ultrabond-turf-2-star-pro-green.description: Two-component, fast-set polyurethane adhesive for high-performance seaming and direct bonding of synthetic turf in athletic and landscape installations. Coloured green. Cures in 2-4 hours. Meets FIFA 2-STAR performance.
mapei-ultrabond-turf-2-star-pro-green.classification: Two-component polyurethane turf seam adhesive (FIFA 2-star certified)

coverage.notes: Coverage depends on trowel notch and turf backing

application_areas: Direct bonding of turf (low humidity, cool climate)

mapei-ultrabond-p909-2k.name: ULTRABOND P909 2K
mapei-ultrabond-p909-2k.description: Two-component, water and solvent-free polyurethane adhesive with very low VOC. 'Hard' category adhesive per EN 14293 for all types of wood/parquet flooring.
mapei-ultrabond-p909-2k.classification: EN 14293 'hard' class two-component polyurethane wood adhesive (EMICODE EC1 R Plus)
mapei-ultrabond-p909-2k.mix_ratio: Component A (PU polymer) + Component B (liquid hardener)
application_areas: Heated floors, anhydrite, ceramic, marble substrates

mapei-ultrabond-p990-1k.name: ULTRABOND P990 1K
mapei-ultrabond-p990-1k.description: Ready-to-use one-component, moisture-curing, solvent-free elastic polyurethane adhesive for pre-finished, multi-layered and traditional jointed solid wood parquet. ~30% higher yield than 2K products.
mapei-ultrabond-p990-1k.classification: EN 14293 one-component moisture-curing polyurethane wood adhesive

weber-webercol-fix.name: webercol fix
weber-webercol-fix.description: Ready-mix cement-based tile adhesive for internal use. Water resistant with strong bonding effect. Thixotropic, crack-resistant, non-slump.
weber-webercol-fix.mix_ratio: 4-4.8 L water per 20 kg; 5-6 L per 25 kg
application_areas: Interior bathrooms, kitchens, regular rooms, stairs
Ceramic tiles (not for gypsum substrates or pools)

weber-tile-fix.name: WEBER TILE FIX
weber-tile-fix.description: Weber's basic cement-based tile adhesive (also known as webercol fix plus in some markets). Ready-mix, polymer-modified, water resistant with slip resistance.

weber-webercol-pro.name: WEBER COL PRO
weber-webercol-pro.description: Ready-mix cement-based tile adhesive modified with redispersible polymer. Non-sagging slip-resistant with extended open time. For internal walls/floors and external floors. Can become S1-deformable when mixed with weberad 225 MB.
weber-webercol-pro.classification: C2TE (EN 12004); S1 with weberad 225 MB additive
application_areas: Deformable version (with weberad 225 MB) for heated floors

weber-webercol-plus.name: WEBER COL PLUS
weber-webercol-plus.description: Ready-mix cement-based high-performance polymer 'latex' modified tile adhesive for internal and external use. Strong bonding effect for large tiles or permanent humidity exposure. Low Dust technology (90% reduction).
application_areas: Ceramic, sandstone, granite, marble, porcelain tiles

weber-webercol-premium.name: WEBER COL PREMIUM
weber-webercol-premium.description: Two-component, high-performance cementitious flexible tile adhesive (latex modified). For internal and external use in damp environments. Water resistant, S1 deformable.
application_areas: Large-format tiles on interior/exterior floors and walls

weber-webercol-epo-plus.name: WEBERCOL EPO PLUS
weber-webercol-epo-plus.description: 100% reactive, solvent-free, water-cleanable, thin-bed epoxy tile adhesive. Chemical resistant, waterproof, moisture insensitive. Fast curing, non-sag formulation.
application_areas: Ceramic, vitrified, stone tiles on cement boards, concrete, steel/metal

weber-weberjoint-deco.name: WEBER JOINT DECO
weber-weberjoint-deco.description: High-performance polymer-modified tile grout with non-shading colour technology. High stain resistance, anti-crack, very low water absorption. Wide range of attractive colours.
weber-weberjoint-deco.grouting_wait_floors: 14 days (min 3 days for walls) after traditional site-mix mortar
application_areas: Interior and exterior floor/wall tile grouting

weber-weberjoint-perfect.name: WEBER JOINT PERFECT
weber-weberjoint-perfect.description: High-performance, low-stain cementitious tile grout with Hydro Repell and Mould Stop technologies. Pre-mixed non-shrink grout for wet and dry areas. Ideal for swimming pools.

weber-weberepox-easy.name: WEBERPOX EASY
weber-weberepox-easy.description: 100% reactive, 2-component epoxy tile grout and tile adhesive with easy water-cleanable properties. Chemical resistant, high strength, non-sag, stain resistant. Maintains workability after 1 hour at 40°C.
weber-weberepox-easy.classification: RG / RG2 reactive resin grout (EN 13888); exceeds ANSI A118.3

weber-webertec-mc1.name: WEBERTEC MC1
weber-webertec-mc1.description: Durable mono-component micro concrete with selected sand and aggregates, special cement, green binders and additives. Flowable consistency for congested areas. Shrinkage-compensating for high compressive strength and durability.
weber-webertec-mc1.thickness_range: 30-200 mm per layer (up to 300 mm with reinforcement)

weber-webertec-301.name: WEBERTEC 301
weber-webertec-301.description: Ready-to-use non-shrink structural grout. Shrinkage-compensating mortar with excellent adhesion. Used where high compressive strength and shock/vibration resistance are required.

weber-webertec-grout-p.name: WEBERTEC GROUT P
weber-webertec-grout-p.description: Ready-to-use free-flow cementitious non-shrink precision grout made of sand, special cement and additives. Easy handling with no bleed and zero shrinkage.

weber-weberep-360-ffr.name: WEBER REP 360 FFR
weber-weberep-360-ffr.description: Pre-mixed cementitious paste for fair-face concrete. Dry pre-mixed coating based on hydraulic binders, siliceous filler, water retaining agents and admixtures. Available in white and grey.
application_areas: Repair of honeycombing in fair-face concrete

weber-weberep-331-tx.name: WEBER REP 331TX
weber-weberep-331-tx.description: Ready-to-use non-shrink thixotropic repair mortar with fiber reinforcement. Made of sand (reconstituted grain size), special cement, fibres and additives. High strength, high adhesion, compactness, non-shrinking. Applied manually or by spraying.
application_areas: Edges of steps and load-bearing structures

weber-weberep-epo-412-cry-plus.name: WEBER REP EPO 412 CRY PLUS
weber-weberep-epo-412-cry-plus.description: High strength, thixotropic epoxy patching and bonding paste. Two-component epoxy. Bonding agent for fresh-to-old concrete, patching, and sealant for injection-crack repair systems (used with weberep epo 650 i).
application_areas: Epoxy patching and bonding of concrete

weber-weberanc-405-bfx.name: WEBERANC 405 BFX
weber-weberanc-405-bfx.description: Pure epoxy anchoring resin in cartridge. Two-component high-strength pure epoxy chemical anchoring system. Specifically for heavy loads, anchoring rebar and studs in solid concrete.

weber-webertec-epo-430-grt-plus.name: WEBERTEC EPO 430 GRT PLUS
weber-webertec-epo-430-grt-plus.description: Three-component high-flow epoxy grout: resin, hardener and specific fillers. Very resistant, waterproof, non-shrink resin grout. Fluid consistency for precision grouting/bedding.

weber-weberfloor-epo-patch.name: WEBERFLOOR EPO PATCH
weber-weberfloor-epo-patch.description: Two-component solvent-free epoxy product. Specifically for repairing minor imperfections in concrete substrates and for levelling floors before application of floor coatings, self-levelling, screeds or decorative flooring.
application_areas: Minor imperfection patching under decorative flooring

weber-webertec-epo-450-pc.name: WEBERTEC EPO 450 PC
weber-webertec-epo-450-pc.description: Three-component epoxy mortar. Specifically for pile capping treatment.
weber-webertec-epo-450-pc.classification: Three-component epoxy mortar for PCT (Pile Cap Treatment)
application_areas: Pile cap treatment under waterproofing membranes

weber-weber-sp-33.name: WEBER SP 33
weber-weber-sp-33.description: One-coat high-bonding ready-mix plaster for lightweight blocks. Fibre-reinforced cement-lime ready-mix plaster for traditional masonry rendering.

weber-weber-sp-11.name: WEBER SP 11
weber-weber-sp-11.description: Pre-blended sand-cement ready-mix plaster for internal plastering on blockwork and concrete surfaces before painting. Factory-controlled blend for consistent quality.
application_areas: Internal plaster on block and concrete walls

weber-weberdry-360-pu.name: WEBERDRY 360 PU
weber-weberdry-360-pu.description: One-component liquid-applied polyurethane waterproofing membrane. Creates a continuous watertight seal with excellent adhesion to concrete, metal, bitumen membranes and acrylic paints. Allows moisture vapour transmission.
weber-weberdry-360-pu.notes: All cracks and expansion joints must be sealed with weber jointseal PU before application

weber-weberdry-110-fx.name: WEBERDRY 110 FX
weber-weberdry-110-fx.description: Two-component polymer-modified cementitious waterproof coating. Powder (cements, fillers, admixtures) + liquid (resins, additives). Cures to an elastomeric, waterproof, flexible membrane suitable for potable water tanks, reservoirs, canals, tunnels.
weber-weberdry-110-fx.notes: For use with webercol flex adhesive when tiling over. Certified for potable water contact.

weber-weberdry-116-fx.name: WEBERDRY 116 FX
weber-weberdry-116-fx.description: Flexible cement-based acrylic waterproof coating. Two-component polymer-modified slurry applied to concrete and mortar structures to prevent water infiltration. Used under interior/exterior ceramic tiles.

weber-weberdry-rbe.name: WEBERDRY RBE
weber-weberdry-rbe.description: Rubberized bitumen emulsion protective coating. Dries to form a black, flexible, seamless waterproofing film. Excellent adhesion to most building substrates. Single-component, non-flammable, easy to apply.

coverage.notes: 400-500 microns WFT, 160-200 microns DFT per coat

application_areas: Roof maintenance (concrete, lightweight screed, timber, slate)
weber-weberdry-rbe.notes: Two-coat application recommended; second coat at right angles to first

weber-weberdry-rbv.name: WEBERDRY RBV
weber-weberdry-rbv.description: Ready-to-use cold-applied bitumen emulsion modified with SBR (Styrene Butadiene Rubber). Provides a tough, durable, elastic protective coating. Higher performance rubberized bitumen than RBE.

weber-weberdry-roof.name: WEBERDRY ROOF
weber-weberdry-roof.description: Acrylic-based mono-component premium waterproof coating for roofs. Forms seamless durable membrane, highly flexible, UV-resistant, rain and ponded-water resistant. Used as stand-alone roof coating or topcoat.

weber-weberdry-fabric-fx.name: WEBERDRY FABRIC FX
weber-weberdry-fabric-fx.description: Reinforcing fabric for use in combination with PU-based and cementitious waterproofing membranes. Improves strength, durability, and crack-bridging of the waterproofing system. Used at wall-floor joints, cracks, corners.
weber-weberdry-fabric-fx.notes: Apply 5-10 cm stripe overlapping between sheets

weber-weberdry-150-blc.name: WEBERDRY 150 BLC
weber-weberdry-150-blc.description: Fast-setting hydraulic cement plugging mortar. Instantly and durably stops slight or serious water leaks. Hardens in less than 1 minute and slightly expands during setting. Can be used underwater; resists very high pressure; prevents corrosion.
application_areas: Instant stopping of active water leaks
Sealing water ingress in underground structures

weber-weberfloor-epo-coat.name: WEBERFLOOR EPO COAT
weber-weberfloor-epo-coat.description: Two-component, very low VOC, pigmented solvent-free epoxy floor coating. Self-levelling with excellent smoothness. Heavy-duty pigmented coating for basements, warehouses, industrial factories, ground floor car parks, and traffic decks (no structural movement).
application_areas: Ground floor car parks, traffic decks

weber-weberfloor-topcoat-pu.name: WEBERFLOOR TOPCOAT PU
weber-weberfloor-topcoat-pu.description: Two-component, solvent-based aliphatic isocyanate polyurethane coating. UV-stable with high durability, flexibility, and resistance to abrasion and chemicals. Used as protective topcoat over epoxy or flooring systems.

weber-weberfloor-rapid.name: WEBERFLOOR RAPID
weber-weberfloor-rapid.description: Rapid-drying, ready-to-use polymer-modified hydraulic binder, shrinkage-controlled semi-dry floor screed. Improves quality, strength and drying speed over standard cement screeds. Compliant with EN 13892-1, EN 13813, BS 8204 part 1.
weber-weberfloor-rapid.classification: EN 13892-1 / EN 13813 / BS 8204 part 1 — semi-dry screed
application_areas: Bonded, unbonded, and floating floor screeds

weber-weberfloor-smooth-fd.name: WEBERFLOOR SMOOTH FD
weber-weberfloor-smooth-fd.description: Fine smoothing and low-shrinkage flooring levelling compound with fast-drying property. Fast covering (12-48 hours) with different floor finishes. For interior levelling 1-10 mm on new or existing substrates.

weber-weberfloor-525-fd.name: WEBERFLOOR 525 FD
weber-weberfloor-525-fd.description: Fast-drying, low-shrinking self-levelling cementitious underlayment flooring compound. For internal smoothing and levelling 2-30 mm. Fast covering (24 hours) with all kinds of floor coverings. Alkalinity barrier >5 mm thickness.
application_areas: Thin levelling under vinyl, linoleum, tiles
weber-weberfloor-525-fd.notes: Interior only; not industrial; not for thicknesses >30 mm

weber-weberfloor-535-fd.name: WEBERFLOOR 535 FD
weber-weberfloor-535-fd.description: Fast-drying, HIGH STRENGTH, low-shrinking self-levelling cementitious underlayment. Same thickness range as 525 FD (2-30 mm) but with higher compressive strength. Fast covering at 24 hours. Excellent for high-load areas.
weber-weberfloor-535-fd.classification: Polymer-modified fast-drying high-strength self-levelling cementitious underlayment

weber-webercol-prime.name: WEBERCOL PRIME
weber-webercol-prime.description: Specially formulated acrylic dispersion primer for use before tiling to improve application and adhesion of tile adhesives. Prevents over-rapid absorption of water into very absorbent substrates such as foamed concrete blocks.

weber-weberfloor-4716.name: WEBERFLOOR 4716
weber-weberfloor-4716.description: Styrene acrylate dispersion primer for use prior to application of screeds and self-levelling compounds (weberfloor 535 FD, smooth FD, 525 FD, etc.). Pore sealer preventing air bubbles; prolongs flow life and workability. Dilutable with water. No ammonia. Alkali-resistant.
weber-weberfloor-4716.classification: Styrene acrylate dispersion primer (acrylic) for flooring systems
application_areas: Creating bond between concrete substrate and cement overlays
weber-weberfloor-4716.notes: Not for painted floors, metal substrates, non-porous substrates, or fresh concrete

weber-weber-jointseal-pu-300.name: WEBER JOINT SEAL PU 300
weber-weber-jointseal-pu-300.description: One-component polyurethane sealant for sealing expansion joints, construction joints, and movement joints. Moisture-curing, elastic.
application_areas: Crack sealing before PU waterproofing membranes

laticrete-305.name: LATICRETE 305
laticrete-305.description: Cement-based tile adhesive for internal floor and wall ceramic/vitrified tile installation. Economic option in the LATICRETE range. Good bonding to common substrates.

laticrete-315.name: LATICRETE 315
laticrete-315.description: Single-component, polymer-modified adhesive for interior floor and wall installations and external floor installations. Bonds to concrete, cement mortar beds, brick masonry, existing ceramic tiles, vitrified tiles. Ideal for tile-on-tile bathroom tiling.

coverage.unit: m² per 20 kg bag (6 mm notch)

laticrete-325-plus.name: LATICRETE 325 PLUS
laticrete-325-plus.description: Premium polymer-modified tile adhesive with smooth and creamy consistency, long open time, water and heat resistance. Ready to use — just mix with water. For exterior floors and interior floors/walls.

coverage.unit: m² per 20 kg bag (6×6 mm square notch)

laticrete-335-premium-white.name: LATICRETE 335 PREMIUM WHITE
laticrete-335-premium-white.description: Polymer-modified flexible cement-based thin-set adhesive for interior ceramics, porcelain, mosaic and natural stone. Interior/exterior, floor/wall. Water and shock resistant. Suitable for swimming pools, washrooms, large-format tiles.
laticrete-335-premium-white.classification: C2TES1 (EN 12004 / EN 12002) / ANSI A118.4 shear bond
application_areas: Large-format porcelain tiles on walls and floors
External tile installations with thermal stress

laticrete-254-platinum.name: LATICRETE 254 PLATINUM
laticrete-254-platinum.description: Multipurpose, one-step thin-set mortar mixed with water. Factory prepared to the highest quality. Lightweight, smooth creamy formula with incredible bond strength. Equipped with Microban antimicrobial technology.
laticrete-254-platinum.mix_ratio: 5.2 L water per 22.7 kg (5.5 qt per 50 lb)

laticrete-latapoxy-300.name: LATAPOXY 300
laticrete-latapoxy-300.description: 100% solids epoxy adhesive for installation of ceramic tile, stone, thin brick, and thin glass tile. Ultimate adhesion on difficult or unusual substrates (metal, mirror-mesh mosaics, fiberglass, plastic laminates, plywood). Chemical and water resistant.

laticrete-permacolor.name: PERMACOLOR
laticrete-permacolor.description: High-performance cement grout with advanced non-shading colour-consistency technology. Fast-setting, stain-resistant, anti-efflorescence. For joints up to 12 mm wide.
laticrete-permacolor.classification: CG2 WA (EN 13888) / ANSI A118.7 high-performance cement grout

laticrete-spectralock.name: SPECTRALOCK
laticrete-spectralock.description: High-performance epoxy grout. Stain-resistant, colour-consistent, easy to clean. Premium grout for interior and exterior tiling with uniform colour and chemical resistance. Water-cleanable during the installation window.
laticrete-spectralock.classification: RG (EN 13888) / ANSI A118.3 — reactive resin grout

laticrete-latascreed-pm-30.name: LATASCREED PM-30
laticrete-latascreed-pm-30.description: Ready-to-use polymer-modified semi-dry screeding mix. Blend of Portland cement, polymer, fibres, and graded fillers. Produces quality screed with controlled shrinkage and high mechanical strength for early installation.
application_areas: Under ceramic, natural stone, resilient flooring, wood

laticrete-aqua-barrier.name: AQUA BARRIER
laticrete-aqua-barrier.description: Two-part polymer-modified cementitious waterproof slurry (liquid polymer + cement-based powder). Cures to a flexible elastomeric membrane. For concrete/masonry water-retaining structures, balconies, terraces, swimming pools (with AQUA BARRIER NET).
laticrete-aqua-barrier.classification: EN 14891 CM P / ASTM D751 / EN 12390-8
application_areas: Balconies, terraces, swimming pools (with NET reinforcement)
laticrete-aqua-barrier.notes: Reinforce with WPM TAPE across construction joints, bends, and hairline cracks

kerakoll-super-bio.name: SUPER BIO
kerakoll-super-bio.description: Eco-friendly cement-based mineral adhesive for laying ceramic tiles on walls and floors, internal and external areas. Very low VOC emissions. GreenBuilding rated.
application_areas: Interior and exterior floors and walls

kerakoll-biofix.name: BIOFIX
kerakoll-biofix.description: Mineral adhesive with extremely low chemical additive content for high-performance bonding with no vertical slip and long open time, for porcelain tiles, ceramic tiles and natural stone.
application_areas: Interior and exterior floors and walls

kerakoll-bioflex-white.name: BIOFLEX WHITE
kerakoll-bioflex-white.description: Mineral adhesive for high-performance bonding of porcelain tiles, ceramic tiles and natural stone. No vertical slip. Long open time (≥60 minutes at 23°C). White Shock version for sensitive stones. GreenBuilding rating 4, EMICODE EC1 Plus.
application_areas: Porcelain tiles, ceramic tiles, terracotta, klinker, marble, natural stone, mosaics
Various substrates incl. gypsum, timber, metal (with priming)

kerakoll-biogel-no-limit.name: BIOGEL NO LIMIT
kerakoll-biogel-no-limit.description: Structural, flexible geo-binder gel adhesive for large-format tiles. Delivers superior bonding, high deformation capacity, and long-term durability under extreme thermal and mechanical stress. Thixotropic and fluid rheology guarantees full-bed wetting for slim and large slabs.

kerakoll-biogel-extreme.name: BIOGEL EXTREME
kerakoll-biogel-extreme.description: Highly deformable and workable, hybrid gel adhesive. Bonds any material to any substrate and tested under the most extreme working conditions. Extended open time, exceptional bond strength. Revolutionary Biogel gel technology from Kerakoll GreenLab.
pack_size: 10 kg monopack (8.6 kg powder + 1.4 kg liquid)
application_areas: Any substrate (glass mosaic on timber, natural stone on metal)
Swimming pools and extreme wet areas

kerakoll-fugabella-color.name: FUGABELLA COLOR
kerakoll-fugabella-color.description: Decorative resin-cement (hybrid Resina-cemento®) grout designed by Piero Lissoni with 50 design shades. Water-repellent, very low water absorption, high surface hardness, high resistance to common acids, and total colour uniformity. Eliminates efflorescence risk (no Portland cement).
application_areas: Low-thickness slabs, mosaic, marble, natural stone
Interior and exterior floors and walls

kerakoll-fugalite-color.name: FUGALITE COLOR
kerakoll-fugalite-color.description: Water- and stain-proof liquid ceramic grout (epoxy-resin-based) for tile joints. High chemical and mechanical resistance. Guarantees aesthetic and functional continuity of ceramic surfaces. Water-based resin (Fugalite Bio variant is hypoallergenic; tested at University of Modena).
colors: 24+ colours (12 wood-effect variants for Fugalite Bio)

kerakoll-active-prime-grip.name: ACTIVE PRIM GRIP
kerakoll-active-prime-grip.description: Rapid universal adhesion promoter for self-levelling products, cement-based adhesives, finishing products, plasters and renders. Quartz finish. Single-component, water-based. Active cross-link develops compatibility with absorbent AND non-absorbent substrates.
kerakoll-active-prime-grip.classification: Universal bond-promoter primer with quartz filler
application_areas: Under mineral plasters, cement adhesives, decorative coverings

pidilite-pegoland-classic.name: PEGOLAND CLASSIC
pidilite-pegoland-classic.description: C1 cementitious adhesive for bonding ceramic tiles with medium water absorption on interior and exterior floors and interior wall tiling. Economical general-purpose tile adhesive.

pidilite-pegoland-uno.name: PEGOLAND UNO
pidilite-pegoland-uno.description: C1 cementitious tile adhesive for bonding ceramic tiles with medium-to-high water absorption. For interior and exterior floors and interior walls.

pidilite-pegoland-uno-plus.name: PEGOLAND UNO PLUS
pidilite-pegoland-uno-plus.description: C1TE cementitious tile adhesive with improved slip resistance (T) and extended open time (E). For interior and exterior floors and interior walls. Upgrade from standard Pegoland Uno.

pidilite-pegoland-dos.name: PEGOLAND DOS
pidilite-pegoland-dos.description: C2T cementitious adhesive with mixed binders, improved adhesion. For bonding ceramic tiles, porcelain, marble and granite on interior/exterior floors and interior walls.

pidilite-pegoland-dos-plus.name: PEGOLAND DOS PLUS
pidilite-pegoland-dos-plus.description: C2TE cementitious adhesive with mixed binders, improved adhesion, slip resistance and extended open time. Especially recommended for installing rectified tiles and new flooring over old ceramic floors.
application_areas: Interior and exterior floors, interior tile walls

pidilite-pegoland-dos-plus-extra-white.name: PEGOLAND DOS PLUS EXTRA WHITE
pidilite-pegoland-dos-plus-extra-white.description: C2TE extra-white cementitious tile adhesive with mixed binders. High-whiteness formulation for translucent stones and mosaics where white background is critical.

pidilite-pegoland-flex.name: PEGOLAND FLEX
pidilite-pegoland-flex.description: C2TE S1 deformable cementitious tile adhesive with mixed bonding agents. High flexibility and adherence, reduced slip, extended open time. Specially recommended for façades, large areas, and underfloor heating systems.

pidilite-pegoland-superflex.name: PEGOLAND SUPERFLEX
pidilite-pegoland-superflex.description: C2TE S2 highly deformable cementitious tile adhesive. Excellent workability, high flexibility and adhesion, reduced slip, extended open time. For slate and demanding installations.

pidilite-pegoland-fast-flex.name: PEGOLAND FAST FLEX
pidilite-pegoland-fast-flex.description: C2FTE S1 fast-hardening deformable cementitious tile adhesive with mixed bonding agents. Reduced slip, fast drying. Does not stain stones after curing. Especially for façades, large floors, underfloor heating and fast-track projects.

pidilite-pegoland-elastic.name: PEGOLAND ELASTIC R2T
pidilite-pegoland-elastic.description: Two-component reactive epoxy-polyurethane tile adhesive (R2T). Improved white bicomponent reactive adhesive with no vertical sliding. For ceramic tiles, mosaics, natural stones and resin conglomerates.

pidilite-morcemcolor-universal-grout.name: MORCEMCOLOR UNIVERSAL GROUT
pidilite-morcemcolor-universal-grout.description: Coloured cementitious grout with additives, great fineness and plasticity. For sealing joints 2 to 15 mm in all types of floor and wall tiling. Special for grouting low-porosity pieces (porcelain stoneware) and swimming pools.
pidilite-morcemcolor-universal-grout.classification: CG2 A W (EN 13888 — improved cementitious grout with reduced water absorption and abrasion resistance)

coverage.notes: e.g. 15×15 cm tile with 5 mm joint = 0.68 kg/m²

pidilite-morcemcolor-plus-flexible.name: MORCEMCOLOR PLUS FLEXIBLE
pidilite-morcemcolor-plus-flexible.description: Coloured water-repellent CG2 WA cementitious grout with mixed binders, anti-fungal and anti-algae bioactive technology. AQUASTOP effect for pearl water beading. For low-porosity tiles and pools.
pidilite-morcemcolor-plus-flexible.classification: CG2 W A (EN 13888 — with reduced water absorption W and abrasion resistance A)

coverage.notes: e.g. 30×40 cm tile with 5 mm joint = 0.30 kg/m²

pidilite-morcemcolor-epoxy.name: MORCEMCOLOR EPOXY
pidilite-morcemcolor-epoxy.description: RG reactive resin epoxy grout. Highly acid-resistant and impermeable. For pools, ponds, spas, thermal baths with saline or acid-treated water, and areas with extreme temperature fluctuations.

pidilite-fevicol-floorfix-supertac.name: FEVICOL FLOORFIX SUPERTAC
pidilite-fevicol-floorfix-supertac.description: Water-based acrylic tackifier for dry-lay installation of floor tiles and carpets. Provides releasable tacky bond for modular flooring.

pidilite-fevicol-floorfix-xpress.name: FEVICOL FLOORFIX XPRESS
pidilite-fevicol-floorfix-xpress.description: Multipurpose acrylic adhesive for bonding vinyl, rubber, linoleum, and carpet flooring. Fast-grab, high-strength dispersion adhesive.

pidilite-stauf-r-202.name: STAUF R 202
pidilite-stauf-r-202.description: One-component polyurethane adhesive for rubber, PVC, vinyl and textile floor coverings on absorbent and non-absorbent substrates.

pidilite-stauf-r-105.name: STAUF R 105
pidilite-stauf-r-105.description: Two-component polyurethane adhesive for floor coverings. Waterproof and highly-resistant for demanding rubber and synthetic sports flooring installations.

pidilite-stauf-puk-447.name: STAUF PUK 447
pidilite-stauf-puk-447.description: Hard two-component elastic polyurethane wood flooring adhesive, shear strength >680 psi. For wide plank and solid parquet. Complies with ISO 17178 (hard elastic classification).
pidilite-stauf-puk-447.classification: 2K PU wood flooring adhesive — ISO 17178 (hard elastic)

pidilite-stauf-multilayer.name: STAUF MULTILAYER
pidilite-stauf-multilayer.description: One-component elastic hybrid (MS polymer) wood flooring adhesive per ISO 17178 for elastically-deformable engineered multi-layer wood flooring. Water and solvent-free — no wood swelling. Underfloor-heating compatible.
pidilite-stauf-multilayer.classification: 1K MS-polymer hybrid wood flooring adhesive — ISO 17178
application_areas: Concrete, calcium sulphate, chipboard, OSB subfloors

pidilite-stauf-floorfix-d53.name: STAUF FLOORFIX D 53
pidilite-stauf-floorfix-d53.description: Self-levelling floor leveling compound for fine-finish cementitious subfloor preparation before wood/resilient flooring.

pidilite-stauf-floorfix-d63.name: STAUF FLOORFIX D 63
pidilite-stauf-floorfix-d63.description: High-performance self-levelling floor leveling compound for heavier traffic applications and greater thickness range than D 53.

pidilite-stauf-floorfix-vep93.name: STAUF FLOORFIX VEP 93
pidilite-stauf-floorfix-vep93.description: Two-component solvent-free epoxy primer and bonding agent for flooring substrates. Moisture vapor barrier on damp concrete (above 4% RH).

pidilite-dr-fixit-epoxy-putty.name: DR. FIXIT EPOXY PUTTY (PIDIPOXY)
pidilite-dr-fixit-epoxy-putty.description: Two-component epoxy putty/repair compound. High bonding, compressive and flexural strength for horizontal, vertical and overhead jobs. Bonds fresh-to-hardened concrete, anchors engine bolts and marble to plywood. Immersible permanently in water.
application_areas: Anchoring dowel bars, base plates, engine bolts
pidilite-dr-fixit-epoxy-putty.chemical_resistance: Vegetable/mineral oils, alkalis, continuous water immersion

pidilite-paviland-sl-10.name: PAVILAND SL 10 / SOLERA AUTONIVELANTE
pidilite-paviland-sl-10.description: CT C25 F5 cementitious self-levelling screed of great fluidity and normal setting. For interior self-levelling screeds 10-50 mm (bonded) or 50-100 mm (floating). Radiant heating compatible.

pidilite-dr-fixit-fastflex.name: DR. FIXIT FASTFLEX
pidilite-dr-fixit-fastflex.description: High-performance polymer-modified flexible cementitious waterproofing membrane. Two-component system for wet areas and water-retaining structures (swimming pools, water features). Potable-water-tank rated.
pack_size: 12 kg kit (7 kg powder + 5 kg polymer)

pidilite-dr-fixit-unicem-31.name: DR. FIXIT UNICEM 3.1
pidilite-dr-fixit-unicem-31.description: Two-component acrylic copolymer-based flexible cementitious waterproofing system. Crack-bridging, carbonation/chloride protection, potable-water-tank rated. For roofs, balconies, wet areas, concrete tanks.
pidilite-dr-fixit-unicem-31.classification: Flexible cementitious waterproofing (EN 14891 CM O1 P)
pack_size: 20 kg kit (15 kg powder + 5 kg liquid)
application_areas: Back-coating of natural stone and mineral cladding

xchem-enifix-va.name: ENIFIX VA
xchem-enifix-va.description: High-quality, low-emission, high-strength water-based dispersion adhesive for vinyl floor covering, textile floor coverings with latex/PVC/PUR foam backing, polyolefin sheeting, Quartz Vinyl Floor, rubber sheets and tiles up to 2.5 mm thickness with smooth & sanded back.
application_areas: Textile floor coverings with latex/PVC/PUR foam backing
Quartz vinyl floor, rubber sheets and tiles (≤2.5 mm)

xchem-enifix-ca.name: ENIFIX CA (CA303)
xchem-enifix-ca.description: High-coverage contact adhesive based on polychloroprene rubber, designed for carpet and tile fixing. Double-stick carpet flooring adhesive delivering strong durable bond.

xchem-enifix-ct.name: ENIFIX CT
xchem-enifix-ct.description: Water-based acrylic polymer tackifier adhesive for flooring. Used for dry-lay applications of carpet tiles and similar modular flooring requiring light tack.

xchem-turf-fix-511.name: TURF FIX 511
xchem-turf-fix-511.description: Single-component, hot-climate-formulated artificial grass adhesive. High-strength all-weather adhesive suitable for indoor and outdoor use. Excellent water and heat resistance, bonds to wide variety of substrates. Made in UAE.

xchem-turf-flx-550.name: TURF FLX 550
xchem-turf-flx-550.description: Polychloroprene rubber-based flexible adhesive for turf and flooring applications. High-performance bonding for flexible substrates.

xchem-turf-flx-570.name: TURF FLX 570
xchem-turf-flx-570.description: Premium turf and flexible flooring adhesive (upgraded from TURF FLX 550). High-strength elastomeric bonding with improved durability.

xcalibur-bugfill.name: X-SHIELD BUGFILL
xcalibur-bugfill.description: High-build epoxy bug hole filler, skim coat and general-purpose adhesive. Two-component epoxy for filling blowholes, surface crack filling, skim-coating, tank lining, bedding mortar, and anchor-bolt installation.
application_areas: Surface crack filling, skim coating, cap-sealing

xcalibur-xseal-pu25.name: X-SEAL PU25
xcalibur-xseal-pu25.description: One-part fast-curing low-modulus polyurethane sealant. Moisture-cure, elastomeric seal with high elasticity. Good adhesion to most industrial substrates (glass, anodized aluminum, lacquered metal, wood, FRP, concrete) without primer.
xcalibur-xseal-pu25.classification: ISO 11600 class 25 LM (low-modulus); SCAQMD Rule 1168 / LEED VOC compliant
application_areas: High-movement joints in concrete and masonry
xcalibur-xseal-pu25.chemical_resistance: Sewage, sabkha, mineral acids, alkalis, salt water

vetonit-premium-fix.name: PREMIUM FIX
vetonit-premium-fix.description: Premium cementitious tile adhesive composed of hydraulic binders, selected aggregates and special additives. For ceramic and terrazzo tiles. Applied at 3-10 mm thickness.
application_areas: Interior and exterior floors and walls

vetonit-tile-fix-universal.name: TILE FIX UNIVERSAL
vetonit-tile-fix-universal.description: Universal cementitious tile adhesive. Composed of hydraulic binders, selected aggregates and special additives. For bonding ceramic tiles on walls and floors.

vetonit-tile-fix-universal-c2te.name: TILE FIX UNIVERSAL C2TE
vetonit-tile-fix-universal-c2te.description: Upgraded C2TE cementitious tile adhesive with improved adhesion, slip resistance and extended open time. For larger-format and lower-absorption tiles.

vetonit-porcelain-tile-fix.name: PORCELAIN TILE FIX (PORCELAIN PLUS GREEN)
vetonit-porcelain-tile-fix.description: Deformable cementitious adhesive with improved characteristics, slip resistance and extended open time. Specially for porcelain and large non-absorbent tiles. Applied at 3-10 mm.

vetonit-ultra.name: VETONIT ULTRA
vetonit-ultra.description: High-performance cementitious mortar adhesive for fixing tiles, terrazzo tiles, marble, and Riyadh stones. Applied at 3-10 mm thickness.

vetonit-vetoset-ca545.name: VETOSET CA545 (A+B)
vetonit-vetoset-ca545.description: Two-component polymer-modified cementitious tile adhesive. Enhanced adhesion and flexibility for demanding tile installations. Ideal for pools, fountains, and water tanks.
vetonit-vetoset-ca545.classification: C2 E S1 two-component cementitious adhesive
pack_size: Two-component kit (20 kg powder + 5 kg liquid polymer)

vetonit-vetoset-ea454.name: VETOSET EA454
vetonit-vetoset-ea454.description: Three-component R2 reaction-resin epoxy tile adhesive. Chemically-resistant, high-strength bonding for demanding installations.

vetonit-vetoset-ua456.name: VETOSET UA456
vetonit-vetoset-ua456.description: Two-component polyurethane-based binder for sandwich panels and flexible bonding. For demanding tile and panel installations.

vetonit-vetofix-vinyl.name: VETOFIX VINYL
vetonit-vetofix-vinyl.description: One-component acrylic vinyl floor adhesive with extended open time. For vinyl, linoleum, and textile floor coverings.
application_areas: Vinyl floor coverings (PVC sheet and tile)

vetonit-vetofix-parquet.name: VETOFIX PARQUET
vetonit-vetofix-parquet.description: One-component solvent-free elastic polyurethane wood flooring adhesive. For engineered wood, parquet, and multi-layer wood flooring. Underfloor-heating compatible.

vetonit-vetorep-cr520.name: VETOREP CR520 (formerly VETOMORTAR CHR)
vetonit-vetorep-cr520.description: High-strength structural repair mortar for concrete substrates. R4-class cementitious mortar for load-bearing repairs.
vetonit-vetorep-cr520.classification: EN 1504-3 Class R4 structural repair mortar

vetonit-vetorep-cr521.name: VETOREP CR521
vetonit-vetorep-cr521.description: High-strength structural non-shrink self-compacting micro-concrete for deep repairs. Used with formwork for columns, beams, and voids.

vetonit-vetorep-cr523.name: VETOREP CR523
vetonit-vetorep-cr523.description: R1/R2 single-component cementitious fairing coat for smoothing concrete surfaces and filling surface imperfections.

vetonit-vetorep-er350.name: VETOREP ER350
vetonit-vetorep-er350.description: Two-component epoxy-based thixotropic solvent-free putty. For repair of surface imperfections, blowhole filling, anchoring, and leveling. Smooth-buttery paste, non-slump, can be feather-edged and built up to 3 mm in single layer.
vetonit-vetorep-er350.cure_time: 24 hours foot traffic, 7 days full strength

vetonit-vetonet-pls-221.name: VETONET PLS 221
vetonit-vetonet-pls-221.description: Premix plaster for general concrete and masonry finishing. For internal application on block walls and rough surfaces.

vetonit-vetonet-pls-222.name: VETONET PLS 222
vetonit-vetonet-pls-222.description: Upgraded premix plaster for smoother finish and exterior application. Polymer-modified for improved adhesion.
vetonit-vetonet-pls-222.classification: GP CSIII W2 polymer-modified cementitious plaster (EN 998-1)

vetonit-vetogrout-cg510.name: VETOGROUT CG510
vetonit-vetogrout-cg510.description: Non-metallic cementitious precision grout. For accurate anchoring, base plate grouting, and machinery bedding.

vetonit-vetogrout-cg519.name: VETOGROUT CG519
vetonit-vetogrout-cg519.description: Ultra-high-strength non-shrink cementitious grout (>85 MPa). For heavy-duty machinery bedding, structural anchoring, and demanding grouting applications.

vetonit-betocem-80.name: BETOCEM 80 / VETOTOP CS536
vetonit-betocem-80.description: Premixed 30-100 mm thick cementitious screed for floor leveling and renovation. For bonded and unbonded applications.

vetonit-vetotop-cl530.name: VETOTOP CL530
vetonit-vetotop-cl530.description: Premixed 2-10 mm thick cementitious self-leveller for final floor finishing. High flowability and smooth finish.

vetonit-vetotop-cs536.name: VETOTOP CS536
vetonit-vetotop-cs536.description: Premixed 30-100 mm thick cementitious screed for bonded and unbonded applications. Suitable for underfloor heating.

vetonit-vetotop-ec498.name: VETOTOP EC498
vetonit-vetotop-ec498.description: Solvent-free high-performance high-build epoxy floor topping. Two-component epoxy system for heavy industrial floors.

vetonit-vetobond-pb433.name: VETOBOND PB433
vetonit-vetobond-pb433.description: Polymer bonding admixture for cementitious repair mortars and screeds. Improves adhesion, flexibility, and water resistance.

vetonit-monneli-primer-ac.name: MONNELI PRIMER AC
vetonit-monneli-primer-ac.description: Acrylic water-based primer (Monneli brand — sibling distribution to Saveto). For consolidating absorbent surfaces before coating or smoothing compound application.

vetonit-vetoprime-ep490-491.name: VETOPRIME EP490 / EP491
vetonit-vetoprime-ep490-491.description: Two-component solvent-free epoxy primer. EP491 as film-forming primer; EP490 as penetrating primer for epoxy floor systems.

vetonit-vetoproof-cm745.name: VETOPROOF CM745 (VETOPROOF S)
vetonit-vetoproof-cm745.description: Two-component flexible polymer-modified cementitious waterproof coating with unique crack-bridging characteristics even after long-term water immersion. Potable-water-approved and withstands negative hydrostatic pressure.
vetonit-vetoproof-cm745.classification: EN 14891 CM O2 P crack-bridging cementitious membrane

vetonit-vetoproof-azl.name: VETOPROOF AZL
vetonit-vetoproof-azl.description: Single-component, cold liquid-applied waterproofing and protective coating based on hybrid polyurethane technology. Flexible, durable, UV-resistant. High solar reflectance (SRI) cool-roof white colour.
vetonit-vetoproof-azl.classification: 1K hybrid polyurethane liquid waterproofing (UV-stable cool roof)

vetonit-vetoproof-s-20kg.name: VETOPROOF CM745 (20 KG KIT)
vetonit-vetoproof-s-20kg.description: Compact 20 kg variant of Vetoproof CM745 crack-bridging cementitious waterproofing membrane. Same performance characteristics.
vetonit-vetoproof-s-20kg.classification: EN 14891 CM O2 P crack-bridging cementitious membrane

vetonit-vetoproof-nwp-mesh.name: VETOPROOF NWP MESH
vetonit-vetoproof-nwp-mesh.description: Non-woven polypropylene reinforcement mesh for waterproofing systems. Embedded between coats of cementitious or liquid membranes.
application_areas: Reinforcement for Vetoproof CM745 and AZL

vetonit-kretesil-colmef.name: KRETESIL (COLMEF)
vetonit-kretesil-colmef.description: Colmef-branded crystalline cementitious waterproofing system. Penetrating silicate-based formulation for positive and negative-side waterproofing.

vetonit-monneli-elastoseal-pu40.name: MONNELI ELASTOSEAL PU40
vetonit-monneli-elastoseal-pu40.description: One-component polyurethane elastomeric joint sealant, ±25% movement capability. For expansion joints and dynamic joint sealing.

vetonit-vetoflex-pu780.name: VETOFLEX PU780
vetonit-vetoflex-pu780.description: Single-component liquid-applied polyurethane waterproofing membrane with sealant capability. For joints in waterproofing systems.
